default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' content creation services for Zach Albertson's company, ensemblecore.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation, producing 20-30 high-quality pieces/month](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [ensemblecore.ai seeks to expand market reach after broadening their AI product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Programmatic content strategy recommended, starting at $9k/mo for 100 pages/month](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Potential start date: April 14th or following week, pending agreement and availability](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-driven workflows (10-12) with 250+ steps from keyword to final content](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Incorporates company-specific knowledge bases (e.g., API docs) for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Human oversight: 3 layers of human review before content publication](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Custom "Content OS" for client collaboration and content management](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Full engineering staff continuously improving workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### ensemblecore.ai's Content Needs

  - [Recently expanded product capabilities to work with all AI data types](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Need to create content around use cases and tool integration in AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Target audience: AI/ML engineers (similar to other GrowthX clients like Hyper-mode)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Goal: Increase visibility and attract more potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Content Types and Distribution

  - [Primary focus on long-form content (blog posts, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Can repurpose content for social media (e.g., LinkedIn posts)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Flexibility to create editorial or programmatic content based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Pricing and Capacity

  - [Starting at $9k/month for 3,000-4,000 words (25 articles/month)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Programmatic option: $100/page, \~100 pages/month](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Current capacity: Limited availability due to high demand (4-5 week delay)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Client Success Stories

  - [Shared examples: Reddit, Ramp, Galileo, Hyper-mode](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Demonstrated traffic growth (e.g., Hyper-mode: 4,000 to 24,000 visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SOW) for programmatic content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Zach to review SOW and discuss with co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Determine desired start date and communicate back to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call if more discussion needed](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Upon agreement, GrowthX to add Zach to Slack for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/9zpj1wuQpcjaeNxJK_GdAW6wubPja4fJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

action_items.description: Discuss GrowthX proposal with co-founder, decide on engagement
Add Zach to Slack for further questions and communication
Study Ensemble Core account, competitors for tailored strategy recommendation
Review SOW for programmatic content strategy sent by Bruno
Send SOW for programmatic content strategy to Zach
